docs.text:
Welcome! Namaste!


I am a 
geophysicist
 by background, currently a postdoctoral associate in the 

Imaging and Computing Group
, Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT).


My research interests are in:




inverse problems


imaging


seismic interferometry


signal processing

docs.title: Research

docs.text:
I mainly write software in 
FORTRAN
 and 
Julia
. Most of the packages are shared on my 
GitHub
 page, 
while I also include here some useful subroutines that I have worked on.


Seismic Inversion Toolbox in Julia




Documentation


A simple Jupyter 
notebook
 that demonstrates 
full waveform inversion of seismic data.




Programming Utils




A Makefile to Automatically Compile f90 Source Files with Dependencies




Signal Processing




Construct a Minimum Phase Butter-Worth Filter in Using Log Spectra
